allow:
Bash(printf '#!/bin/bash
exec 3<>/dev/tcp/localhost/9990

echo -e ""GET /health/ready HTTP/1.1\\\\nhost: localhost:9990\\\\n"" >&3

timeout --signal=SIGTERM 5 cat <&3 | grep -m 1 status | grep -m 1 UP
ERROR=$?

exec 3<&-
exec 3>&-

exit $ERROR
')
Bash(about" || echo "No README found in root ")

Bash(sed -i "s|import { logger } from ''../services/logger'';|import { log } from ''../services/log'';|g" lib/apiClient.ts hooks/useDataPrefetch.ts context/AuthContext.tsx context/SessionAuthProvider.tsx)
